home.title: HelloService — Phone & Gadget Repair
home.heroSubtitle:
Fast, quality, with warranty.
Free diagnostics.
home.benefit1Text: Fast and free check of all possible issues with your device
home.benefit2Text: All necessary parts are already included in the repair cost — no hidden fees
home.benefit3Text: Every repair includes a warranty on both the parts and completed work
home.benefit4Text: Most repairs done same day; simple fixes in as little as 20 minutes
home.benefit5Text: We always quote the price before starting. You pay only for what's actually needed
home.benefit6Text: We provide a loaner smartphone while your device is being repaired
home.ctaText: Leave a request — our technician will diagnose your device for free

remont.title: Phone & Gadget Repair
remont.ctaText: Leave a request — we'll find the right technician for you

workStages.title: How we work
workStages.step1Text: Book online or by phone — we'll arrange a convenient time
workStages.step2Text: Our technician checks your device and identifies the exact issue
workStages.step3Text: Quality parts and experienced technicians. Most repairs done same day
workStages.step4Text: We test your device across 15+ parameters before handover
workStages.step5Text: Pick up your working device with a warranty card in hand
